field.label: Pallor Level (Type: 'severe', 'normal', or 'uncertain')
field.hint: Please enter exactly 'severe', 'normal', or 'uncertain' (accepts capitalization or spaces).

field.label: Hemoglobin (g/dL) - Optional
field.hint: If available, enter a valid clinical hemoglobin reading between 2.0 and 25.0 g/dL.

field.label: Patient Age (Years)
field.hint: Requires a valid age entry between 0 and 125.

workflow.outcome: CRITICAL CLASSIFICATION: High-probability severe anemia profile recognized by the engine metrics. Initiate immediate emergency triage, dispatch iron therapy warnings, and route patient to a specialist officer.
MODERATE CLASSIFICATION: Mild anemia variant indicated. Log patient onto the community iron supplementation tracker and schedule an automated follow-up triage visit within 14 days.
NORMAL CLASSIFICATION: Patient data lies within typical health indicators. No immediate therapeutic clinical actions are required at this juncture. Re-screen during routine community health checks.
ALERT: AI engine confidence thresholds were insufficient to calculate a deterministic outcome path. Re-route tracking to traditional on-site nursing diagnostics protocols manually.
